title: Agree a target with your leader before going for the Activity Plus badge.
notes:
An Activity Plus badge can be awarded for any activity badge, apart from the following: Athletics, Athletics Plus, Community Impact, Hikes Away, Nights Away and Time on the Water.

When an Activity Plus is awarded for a Staged Activity Badge, it can only be awarded against the highest stage of that badge.

You can find some example targets in the Tips section of this page.
